Top 10 Positions

How this works

Gold diamonds are managers (always visible). Glowing spheres in the middle are themes — the things managers converge on. Click either one (or just zoom in) to reveal the stocks connecting them.

Click any dot to list its holdings on the left.

Themes

Pick 2+ managers, 2+ themes, or mix to auto-compare. Two managers open the pairwise view.

View

Compare two managers

Tip: click a manager, then Shift-click another to compare.

Manager similarity

White links join managers with similar books (thicker = more alike). Hover for the overlap · click to Compare.

Themes (color / show-hide)

Legend

Manager (gold diamond, always visible)
Theme hub (center, glowing, shared by all managers in it)
Stock (cube, revealed on zoom/click)
Stock size ∝ number of holding funds (crowding)
Edge width ∝ position size (conviction)
Manager ↔ manager similarity (overlay)
Stock color = MTD ROR (grey = no data yet)
negative0 / n/apositive
